docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $360.16 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-11-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E. $360.16 PRINCIPAL, $54.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $414.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4.62 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $448.25 AS TO DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ILAGAN EDUARDO E.
